title: T-029 — POST /receive-to-line (TO in-transit accept) (06-b)
prompt:
# T-029 — receive TO line

PRD: 06-SCANNER-P1-PRD.md §8.2 FR-SC-BE-023
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Accept a TO line by validating that the LP is in-transit and qty_actual ≤ expected; record discrepancy_reason if undershoot.

## Implementation contract
1. POST /api/warehouse/scanner/receive-to-line body Zod `{ to_line_id, lp_id_in_transit, qty_actual, discrepancy_reason? }`.
2. Validations: LP exists in org; LP status='in_transit'; qty_actual > 0; qty_actual ≤ to_line.expected_qty.
3. On success: update LP.status='available', LP.location_id=to.destination_location, write stock_moves move_type='receive_to', audit row.
4. Idempotency via X-Client-Operation-Id.

## Files
- apps/scanner/src/app/api/warehouse/scanner/receive-to-line/route.ts [create]
- apps/scanner/src/server/services/warehouse-receive.ts [modify]
- apps/scanner/__tests__/api/receive-to-line.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a TO line expected_qty=80 and an LP in-transit with current_qty=80, when POST receive-to-line is called with qty_actual=80, then 200 and the LP transitions to status='available' with location set to to.destination
2. Given the LP is not in_transit (status='available'), when POST runs, then 409 SC_TO_NOT_IN_TRANSIT and no rows are mutated
3. Given qty_actual=70 (undershoot) without discrepancy_reason, when POST runs, then 400 SC_QTY_DISCREPANCY_REQUIRES_REASON

## Test strategy
- RED: write receive-to-line.test.ts asserting happy path + non-in-transit reject + missing-discrepancy-reason reject before implementation
- Run 'pnpm --filter scanner test api/receive-to-line'

## Risk red lines
- Do not allow qty_actual > expected_qty without supervisor override path (out of P1)
- Do not skip stock_moves creation
- Do not let client override org_id

pipeline_inputs.description: TO-line receive endpoint with in-transit validation and discrepancy reason enforcement.
pipeline_inputs.details: Single POST handler validates LP status, qty bounds, optional discrepancy_reason, and on success transitions LP + writes stock_moves + audit. Idempotent via X-Client-Operation-Id.
out_of_scope: Do not implement supervisor over-receipt override
Do not implement SCN-030 UI here (T-032)
